starterCode:
-- Create a table called 'scores' with three numbers: 100, 85, 92
-- Then use a for loop with ipairs to print each score

tests.description: Use ipairs to iterate over the table
Include the number 100 in your table

hints: Create a table using curly braces: local scores = {100, 85, 92}
Use 'for i, score in ipairs(scores) do' to loop through the table
Don't forget to use 'print(score)' inside your loop
successMessage: Great work! You've mastered tables and loops. These are essential for managing data in your Roblox games!
